hooks.command: echo '--- Session Start: Test Agent ---' && echo 'Reading profiles...' && cat ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/profiles/test-agent.md 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && cat ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/profiles/manual-agent.md 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && cat ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/profiles/config-agent.md 2>/dev/null && echo '=== CHANGELOG ===' && tail -50 ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/knowledge/CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Pending Requests ===' && ls ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/requests/*test* 2>/dev/null || echo 'No pending requests for test agent' && echo '=== Notifications ===' && ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/notify.sh check test 2>/dev/null && ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/notify.sh clean test 2>/dev/null

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'shared/responses/'; then BASENAME=$(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" .md); TARGET=$(echo "$BASENAME" | sed 's/^[^-]*-//; s/_.*//' | head -c 20); ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/notify.sh signal "$TARGET" test "$BASENAME" RESPONSE 2>/dev/null; fi

_comments.mcp_servers: This agent uses BPA-cuba (read-only) for structure extraction and Playwright for E2E testing. MCP server connections are configured at user level (~/.claude.json or Claude Desktop config).
_comments.role: Test Agent (Verificador) — generates and runs Playwright E2E tests against cuba.eregistrations.org
